docs.title: Welcome!
docs.text: This is my portfolio website. It has been created with MkDocs using the Material for MkDocs theme.

docs.title: Who am I?
docs.text: I am Shane, a student and IT practitioner interested in computers, radio, security, and technology. I focus on building hands-on experience through project-based learning and real-world IT support work. I believe knowledge should be accessible, and I am willing to teach and share what I have learned with others who want to learn.

docs.title: What Are my Services?
docs.text: I provide freelance IT support, troubleshooting, and cybersecurity awareness training based on experience in IT support roles and technical mentorship.

docs.title: IT Intern at Paw Paw Public Schools, Michigan
docs.text:
July 2025 – August 2025

  • Performed repair and maintenance on Chromebook devices
  • Used GoGuardian Fleet management tools to manage and decommission Chromebooks
  • Imaged Dell desktops and laptops using SCCM
  • Installed Cisco wireless access points
  • Assisted with setup of networking equipment including rack patching and structured cabling
  • Install UPS Units in Networking closets

docs.title: IT Assistant
docs.text:
Van Buren Technical CenterPaw Paw High School

Van Buren Technical Center: Janurary-March 2026

  • Shadowed the Network Administration team
  • Supported the IT support team with desktop imaging, device troubleshooting
  • Installation of Avigilon Security Cameras
  • Assisted in troubleshooting Active Diretory

Paw Paw Public Schools: Augest - January 2026

  • Investigated repeated logon CMD pop-ups using Procmon and logs, tracing the cause to a Group Policy restriction blocking a scheduled process running under a local user.

docs.title: Volunteer Cyber Security Assistant Instructor at VBTC
docs.text:
• Assisted in teaching networking, OSINT, subnetting, Linux, and Windows fundamentals
  • Supported students in hands-on labs, custom slides and lectures with one-on-one tutoring.
  • Helped with troubleshooting and classroom infrastructure setup

docs.title: Digital Safety Mini Lessons (Independent Teaching)
docs.text:
• Delivered short lessons on online safety and digital security for high school students
  • Topics included phishing awareness, MFA usage, password management, cookies, trackers, and digital footprint awareness

docs.title: High School Student (Grade 12)
docs.text:
August 2022 – May 2026 (In Progress)

  • Coursework includes Game Design and Robotics
  • Assisted with making lessons and giving lecutures for a Japanese Class
  • Worked with admistration to present lessons on Digital and Womens online safety

docs.title: Cisco CyberOps Coursework
docs.text:
August 2022 – Present

  • Enrolled in Cisco CyberOps training program
  • Assisting instructor with small-business infrastructure setup and lab environments

docs.title: Certifications
docs.text:
• Cisco Certified Support Technician: Networking
  • Cisco Certified Support Technician: Cybersecurity
  • Cisco Certified Support Technician: IT Support
  • Certiport Information Technology Specialist: Cybersecurity
  • Certiport Information Technology Specialist: Network Security
  • CompTIA Security+ (In Progress)

docs.title: Infrastructure and Systems
docs.text:
• Virtualization using Proxmox
  • Linux system administration across Ubuntu, Debian, Arch, and Fedora
  • Storage configuration including RAID 5 and RAID 6
  • Active Directory and Samba integration for identity management
  • Windows Server administration using Active Directory and Group Policy

docs.title: Networking
docs.text:
• 802.1q VLAN configuration and router-on-a-stick architecture using Cisco L3 switches
  • Configuration and deployment of Layer 3 Cisco switches
  • DNS configuration using BIND9
  • Firewall configuration using UFW, firewalld, and Windows Firewall
  • General network troubleshooting and diagnostics

docs.title: Security and Monitoring
docs.text:
• Security monitoring dashboards using Grafana with RSS-based cybersecurity threat feeds
  • Log monitoring and alerting using Wazuh for SSH and authentication events
  • Familiarity with NIST 800-53, NIST 800-171, and NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF)

docs.title: Automation, Scripting and programming
docs.text:
• Bash scripting for system automation including user management and storage configuration
  • Python scripting for basic tools and utilities
  • Task scheduling using cron
  • System permissions and access control fundamentals

docs.title: Software and Tools
docs.text:
• Microsoft office suite
  • Google Sheets
  • LibreOffice office suite
  • Wazuh SIEM
  • VPN Solutions including twingate
  • Windows Active Directory Users and Computers
  • OpenMedia Vault
  • ProxmoxVE 8.4 and 9.1

docs.title: Projects / Labs
docs.text:
• Built a virtualized lab environment using Proxmox with multiple Linux and Windows systems
  • Designed and documented a /16 subnet and VLAN standard based on structured network design principles
  • Implemented Active Directory integration with Linux systems using Samba
  • Developed automation scripts for system setup and administration tasks
  • Configured a security monitoring dashboard using Grafana and RSS feeds for threat awareness
  • Photography hobby focused on flower macro photography
